hooks.command:
echo 'INNIGKEIT CONTEXT RESTORED AFTER COMPACTION
Please don't just blindly continue work: RE-ORIENT YOURSELF
Verification gate: zig build verify -Darm=true
Baseline: x64 135/135, arm 95 (+10 skipped), host test_native 63
QEMU: zig build test_x64/test_arm/run_x64/run_arm are safe to use directly now: build/Platform.zig picks host QEMU + host AAVMF automatically (no more bundled-QEMU gotcha).
zig build check does NOT validate inline assembly. Run a real kernel build after touching arch asm.
-Dtpm=true/-Dsecboot=true: TPM2_StartAuthSession rc=0x95 bug FIXED (tpm.zig:289 .sessions -> .no_sessions); baseline now x64 152/152 with -Dtpm=true.
Patches go in /tmp/patches/ (numbered, append-only). Never push without a green gate.
Current focus: /code-review pass over the build-system integration is queued (see docs/roadmap.md), prerequisite to restarting the comprehensive test-running/test-harness system (docs/test-harness-plan.md's TH-1..TH-5 draft will be redone from scratch, not resumed as-is).'
